title: ALBA COLLABORATIVE - 211info
text: YOUTH OPPORTUNITY CENTER ALBA COLLABORATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term emergency shelter, mentorship, family mediation, resource referrals, and support with basic needs, including food, clothing, showers, and hygiene supplies with a focus on LGBTQIA2S+ youth. 470 SE 165th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 9-17 and experiencing housing instability Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 754-4350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 754-4350 Main phone Main phone (971) 754-4350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Youth General Clothing Provision * At Risk Youth Mentoring Programs * At Risk Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * At Risk Youth Public Showers/Baths * At Risk Youth Youth Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DROP-IN DAY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OPPORTUNITY CENTER
